raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The excerpt builds an explicit claim chain — prior work → three technical extensions → main empirical claim — whose internal logical coherence (e.g., whether token-level abstention is actually necessitated by replacing LAS with wav2vec 2.0, or whether the iso-accuracy framing is internally consistent) is inspectable and relevant under almost any reading of 'take a look'.","R1.3":"Five specific quantitative results are asserted (38% WER reduction, 12% refusal rate, 22% decoding-cost reduction, 41% relative WER, 2.4% abstention rate) with no referenced tables or figures present in the artifact; whether these numbers are coherent with each other and with the described experimental setup is a natural inspection target regardless of review intent.","R1.4":"The paper's framing and contribution are entirely structured around a comparison to Vaibhava and Hermansky (2018); evaluating whether the three claimed extensions constitute genuine novelty — and whether the cited paper actually exists and makes the claims attributed to it — is central to any substantive reading."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you primarily looking for a writing and style review (sentence clarity, prose quality, narrative flow), or a scientific review (checking logical consistency of claims, evidence-claim alignment, and novelty relative to cited prior work)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The excerpt builds an explicit claim chain — prior work → three technical extensions → main empirical claim — whose internal logical coherence (e.g., whether token-level abstention is actually necessitated by replacing LAS with wav2vec 2.0, or whether the iso-accuracy framing is internally consistent) is inspectable and relevant under almost any reading of 'take a look'.
rationale.R1.3: Five specific quantitative results are asserted (38% WER reduction, 12% refusal rate, 22% decoding-cost reduction, 41% relative WER, 2.4% abstention rate) with no referenced tables or figures present in the artifact; whether these numbers are coherent with each other and with the described experimental setup is a natural inspection target regardless of review intent.
rationale.R1.4: The paper's framing and contribution are entirely structured around a comparison to Vaibhava and Hermansky (2018); evaluating whether the three claimed extensions constitute genuine novelty — and whether the cited paper actually exists and makes the claims attributed to it — is central to any substantive reading.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you primarily looking for a writing and style review (sentence clarity, prose quality, narrative flow), or a scientific review (checking logical consistency of claims, evidence-claim alignment, and novelty relative to cited prior work)?
